reasoning: The question asks whether Israel's net sympathy (or 'favorability' as mistakenly termed by the author), which was 46% - 33% = 13% in the March 2024/2025 Gallup poll, will increase in the March 2026 numbers. A new Gallup poll released on February 27, 2026, revealed that 41% of Americans sympathize more with the Palestinians, while 36% sympathize more with the Israelis. This results in a net sympathy of -5%, a significant decrease from the previous 13%. Since the net sympathy value has decreased rather than increased, the question will definitively resolve NO.
